content.question: How much of Hungary's segregation originates in primary-school choice discretion (below age 11) versus secondary-level gimnazium selection (age 12-13), and would addressing only the latter meaningfully reduce equity gaps?
content.reduction_path: Decompose segregation into primary-school and secondary-school components using linked enrollment and PISA data; model counterfactual segregation under modified school-choice rules with and without tracking-age changes
